title: Sour Canadian Bean Sprout Stir-fry
description: This dish is a vibrant and flavorful meal-prep option featuring crisp bean sprouts with a tangy kick, perfect for adding to your daily menu plan.

ingredients.name: Ketchupy Sour Cream Alternative (e.g. coconut milk or cashew cream)
ingredients.notes: Substitute for a dairy-free souring agent

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Regular soy sauce if vegan-friendly is unavailable

ingredients.name: Olive Oil or Coconut Oil
ingredients.notes: For frying and for adding a bit of richness

instructions: Heat the oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add garlic, stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Throw in the bean sprouts and continue stirring for another 2-3 minutes or until they begin to wilt slightly.
Pour in the ketchup sour cream alternative and soy sauce, making sure everything is well combined.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
Optional: Serve over rice for a balanced meal.
